---
title: "Conference Presentations — Full List"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    css: cv.css
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: "Years"
    anchor-sections: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
library(yaml)

presentations_raw <- yaml::read_yaml("data/presentations.yaml")$presentations

esc <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return("")
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- gsub("&", "&amp;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("<", "&lt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x <- gsub(">", "&gt;", x, fixed = TRUE)
  x
}

title_end <- function(p) {
  last <- substr(p$title, nchar(p$title), nchar(p$title))
  if (last %in% c("?", "!", ".")) "" else "."
}

format_presentation <- function(p) {
  a <- esc(p$authors)
  y <- as.character(p$year)
  t <- esc(p$title)
  te <- title_end(p)
  d <- if (!is.null(p$details)) paste0(" ", esc(p$details)) else ""
  u <- if (!is.null(p$url))
         sprintf(' <a href="%s" class="pub-doi">%s</a>', esc(p$url), esc(p$url))
       else ""
  sprintf('<div class="pub-entry">%s (%s). %s%s%s%s</div>',
          a, y, t, te, d, u)
}

# Render conference presentations grouped by year, reverse-chronological.
# Within a year, YAML source order is preserved (typically newest-date first).
render_by_year <- function(category_name) {
  entries <- Filter(function(p) identical(p$category, category_name), presentations_raw)
  if (!length(entries)) return(invisible())
  years <- sort(unique(vapply(entries, function(p) as.numeric(p$year), numeric(1))),
                decreasing = TRUE)
  for (y in years) {
    base::cat(sprintf("\n## %d\n\n", y))
    yr_entries <- Filter(function(p) as.numeric(p$year) == y, entries)
    base::cat(paste(vapply(yr_entries, format_presentation, character(1)),
                    collapse = "\n\n"))
    base::cat("\n\n")
  }
}

n_conf <- sum(vapply(presentations_raw,
  function(p) identical(p$category, "conference"), logical(1)))
```

::: {.dashboard}
::: {.dashboard-header}
# Conference Presentations {.name}

::: {.titles}
Derek C. Briggs · Full chronological list (`r n_conf` entries, 1999–present)
:::

::: {.contact}
[← Back to CV](cv.html)
:::
:::
:::

```{r}
#| results: asis
render_by_year("conference")
```
